item.title: Razer Huntsman V3 Pro 8KHz Review: A Keyboard for the Competitive
item.description: This esports keyboard isn't particularly comfortable, but it's incredibly competitive.

item.title: Jessie Diggins’ Starter Pack: Winter Olympics 2026
item.description: What a three-time Olympic medalist packs to Milano Cortina 2026.

item.title: Wacom MovinkPad 11 Tablet Review: A Portable Sketch Pad
item.description: Wacom’s Android-based drawing pad tries, and mostly succeeds, to pack a full digital art workstation into a portable sketch pad.

item.title: AI Industry Rivals Are Teaming Up on a Startup Accelerator
item.description: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and a host of other major tech companies have found common ground in F/ai, a new startup accelerator based out of Paris.

item.title: Mazzer Philos Review (2026): Sweet, Zero-Retention Grinds
item.description: Mazzer Philos is a commercial-caliber coffee grinder made for the home countertop. And it made for some of the most delicious espresso I pulled this y...
